articles.title: cisco just proved that when agents share memories, they share trust. nobody audits the trust.
articles.summary:
MemoryTrap. Disclosed today. A single poisoned memory object in Claude Code propagated across sessions, users, and subagents.

Not a prompt injection. Not a jailbreak. A memory write.

articles.title: 91% of organizations deploy AI agents. 10% have a governance strategy. the other 81% are running on trust.
articles.summary:

the gap is not closing. it is widening. every quarter, adoption accelerates and governance stays in committee. the committee...

articles.summary:
